settings.headline: Flower delivery to NewYork-Presbyterian Columbia.
settings.lede: Two blocks from the shop. We hand-deliver same day to NYP Columbia Irving (622 W 168th), Milstein Hospital (177 Fort Washington), Morgan Stanley Children's Hospital (3959 Broadway), and the Allen Hospital (5141 Broadway). Hospital-friendly arrangements (no scent, no soil for ICU) on request.
settings.body_html:
The closest real florist to NYP/Columbia.

Primavera is on the corner of 187th and Fort Washington Avenue. Two blocks from Milstein. Three blocks from Columbia Irving. We've sent flowers to nurses, residents, post-op patients, and visiting families at NYP every week since 2004. We know the lobby desks. We know the children's hospital protocols. We know which units don't allow scent (oncology, ICU) and which welcome it.

What we deliver to NYP.

  • Get-well bouquets (no scent for ICU, oncology, transplant, NICU). Designer's choice using non-fragrant stems: alstroemeria, ranunculus, garden roses without aroma, succulents.
  • New-baby arrangements for Morgan Stanley Children's Hospital and the L&D unit at Milstein. Pink or blue with a plush teddy add-on if you want.
  • Welcome flowers for incoming residents and fellows (we run an ongoing standing-order with the program coordinators on request).
  • Recognition flowers for nurses, attendings, and staff. Often gifted by patient families post-discharge.
  • Sympathy direct to patient rooms or to families at home after a loss in the building.

Where we deliver inside the hospital.

Milstein Hospital Building (177 Fort Washington Ave). Front desk on the 1st floor accepts deliveries. Patient rooms reachable except in ICU/CCU.

Columbia Irving Medical Center main (622 W 168th St). Lobby flower delivery. Visitor hours apply for room delivery. We can also leave at the unit nursing station for staff to deliver.

Morgan Stanley Children's Hospital of NewYork (3959 Broadway). Pediatric ICU does not allow flowers. General pediatrics accepts. NICU does not allow flowers but we can send a plush teddy with a card to the family lounge.

NewYork-Presbyterian Allen Hospital (5141 Broadway, Inwood). Most units accept flowers. Same-day from our shop in 25 minutes.

Hospital-flower etiquette.

  1. No scent for ICU, oncology, transplant, post-op recovery. We default to non-fragrant arrangements for hospital deliveries unless you request otherwise.
  2. No soil for ICU. We use cut flowers in clean water for sterile units.
  3. No lilies if there's a cat or dog at home (lilies are toxic to cats). Worth checking before sending to a discharged patient's home.
  4. Card matters more than flowers. A handwritten note from us, in your words, is included free.
settings.faq_html:
How long does delivery take?

Most orders are at the hospital within 90 minutes of cutoff. We're two blocks away. Order by 2 PM Monday through Saturday for same-day.

What if the patient is in ICU?

ICUs at NYP/Columbia and Allen don't accept flowers in the room. We can deliver to the nurses station or family waiting room. The card with your message gets to them. Once the patient transfers to a regular floor, we can do a fresh delivery.

Do you deliver to NICU or pediatrics?

NICU at Morgan Stanley Children's Hospital does not accept flowers. General pediatrics does. For NICU families, we recommend a plush teddy and handwritten card delivered to the family lounge.

Can I send flowers to a nurse or doctor at NYP?

Yes. Many of our orders are gifts to staff post-discharge. We deliver to the unit and they put it at the nurses station for the team. Tell us the unit (e.g. Milstein 6 South) and the staff member's name.

Do you do recurring deliveries for offices at the hospital?

Yes. Our Estudio subscription tier ($105 per delivery, weekly) covers most NYP/Columbia department offices and waiting rooms. Net-30 invoicing available. See subscription tiers.

What flowers can't go to a hospital?

No fragrant lilies for sensitive units. No soil-based plants for sterile units. No latex (some units restrict balloons). We screen for all of these by default.
settings.final_lede: Two blocks from the shop. Hospital-friendly. Same day if you order by 2 PM.
